_comment: Template for .claude/launch.json. Copy to .claude/launch.json and fill in absolute paths for your environment. The actual launch.json is gitignored — it embeds machine-specific paths (Python interpreter, sibling repo locations) and must not be committed.

configurations.name: memory-stack-all
configurations._description: PromptNexus memory backend (chroma/postgres/mempalace/sqlite-web) via docker compose. Requires <PROMPT_NEXUS_ROOT>/docker/docker-compose.memory.yml from the prompt-nexus sibling repo.

configurations.name: ecc-dashboard
configurations._description: ECC dashboard (Python). On Windows the system 'python3' resolves to a Microsoft Store shim; use the absolute path to a real interpreter. macOS/Linux can usually leave runtimeExecutable as 'python3'.
